rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers both how taxes are set and why bills change. It uses concrete examples, defines key terms, and moves logically from assessment to tax rates to year-to-year changes. Slightly longer than necessary and occasionally a bit formal, but still very accessible and effective for homeowners.
